product_overview: A web dashboard to track ecommerce profit and performance with Shopee integration: sync orders into Supabase, surface KPI metrics and charts, and let users filter by date range and platform.
core_goals: Surface high-level business performance (GMV, revenue, orders, profit margin) on a dashboard.
Track orders and product sales over configurable date ranges and by platform.
Support Shopee integration: connect, refresh tokens, and sync orders into Supabase.
Provide safe client-side filtering and visualizations (bar/pie charts) for actionable insights.
Keep server-side data operations (upserts to orders table) robust and auditable.

features.name: Orders Fetch API
features.description: Server endpoint that lists orders from Supabase filtered by a date window and platform, excluding non-revenue order statuses.
user_flows: GET /api/orders?days=30&platform=Shopee -> Receive 200 with Order[] containing orders within the last 30 days from Shopee (only revenue statuses)
GET /api/orders?days=90 -> Receive 200 with Order[] across all platforms for last 90 days
GET /api/orders?days=200 -> Receive 500 with error message (days exceeds allowed maximum / server error)
GET /api/orders?platform=UnknownPlatform -> Receive 200 with empty Order[] (no orders for unsupported platform) or 500 with error message if platform parsing fails

features.name: Shopee Sync API
features.description: Authenticated server endpoint that triggers a sync from the Shopee Open Platform into Supabase: auto-refreshes access token, fetches order lists in chunked date ranges, fetches order and escrow details, then upserts into Supabase.
user_flows: POST /api/shopee/sync?days=30 with cookies {shopee_access_token, shopee_shop_id} -> Server calls Shopee Open Platform token refresh endpoint (if needed) -> Shopee returns new access token -> Server calls Shopee Open Platform orders search endpoint for a chunked date range -> Shopee returns list of order IDs -> Server calls Shopee Open Platform order detail endpoint per order -> Shopee returns order and escrow details -> Server upserts orders into Supabase orders table via Supabase client -> Supabase returns success -> Client receives 200 with {synced_count, chunks_count, days}
POST /api/shopee/sync?days=30 without cookies (no shopee_access_token or shopee_shop_id) -> Receive 401 Not connected to Shopee

POST /api/shopee/sync?days=90 with cookies -> Server calls Shopee Open Platform token refresh endpoint -> Shopee returns an error (token refresh failed) -> Server returns 500 with error message (sync aborted)
POST /api/shopee/sync?days=0 with cookies -> Server performs minimal fetch (no date range) -> Server returns 200 with synced_count 0 (no orders found)

features.name: Dashboard Page with Metrics and Charts
features.description: Client-side dashboard that queries the Orders Fetch API for the selected date range and platform, computes KPI metrics (GMV, Revenue, Orders, profit margin), renders bar/pie charts with Recharts, and allows triggering a Shopee sync.
user_flows: GET /api/orders?days=30&platform=All -> Receive 200 with Order[] -> (client computes KPIs from response and renders charts)
GET /api/orders?days=7&platform=Shopee -> Receive 200 with Order[] -> (client renders daily bars and revenue pie slices)
GET /api/orders?days=30&platform=All -> Receive 500 with error message -> Client shows error state on dashboard (failed to load metrics)

User clicks Sync button -> POST /api/shopee/sync?days=30 with cookies -> Receive 200 with {synced_count,...} -> Client triggers a follow-up GET /api/orders?days=30&platform=Shopee -> Receive 200 with fresh Order[] (dashboard refreshed)
User clicks Sync button -> POST /api/shopee/sync with missing or invalid cookies -> Receive 401 Not connected to Shopee -> Client shows connection error and prompts user to connect Shopee in Settings

features.name: DateRangePicker Component
features.description: Reusable UI control that emits a selected date-range preset or custom range string which the dashboard passes to the Orders Fetch API for filtering.
user_flows: GET /api/orders?days=1&platform=All (user selected 'Today' in DateRangePicker) -> Receive 200 with Order[] for today
GET /api/orders?days=7&platform=All (user selected 'Last 7 days') -> Receive 200 with Order[] (happy path)
GET /api/orders?days=3650&platform=All (user supplied invalid/custom range exceeding server limits) -> Receive 500 with error message (server rejects excessive date window)
GET /api/orders?days=30&platform=Shopee (user selected custom date range converted by DateRangePicker) -> Receive 200 with Order[] -> (dashboard updates charts)

features.name: Supabase Client (server-side usage)
features.description: Server-side Supabase client used by API routes to read and upsert orders into the Supabase orders table. Currently initialized using environment variables (anon key is used in server routes in the current codebase).
user_flows: Server (POST /api/shopee/sync) upserts orders into Supabase orders table via Supabase client -> Supabase returns success for each upsert -> Server responds 200 with synced count
Server (GET /api/orders) queries Supabase orders table via Supabase client with date filter -> Supabase returns Order[] -> Server responds 200 to client

Server (POST /api/shopee/sync) attempts upsert using an anon key (current limitation) -> Supabase returns 401/403 or upsert unexpectedly succeeds but anon key is exposed -> Server returns 500 or operation succeeds with security risk (error path: permission/ security issue)
Server (GET /api/orders) encounters a Supabase connectivity error or malformed query -> Supabase returns error -> Server responds 500 with error message

features.name: Orders Fetch API
features.description: Fetches orders from Supabase filtered by date window and platform, excluding non-revenue statuses

endpoints.description: List orders from Supabase within a date window, filtered by platform

features.name: Shopee Sync API
features.description: Syncs Shopee orders into Supabase via Shopee Open Platform API; auto-refreshes access token, fetches order list in chunked date ranges, fetches order details and escrow details, then upserts into Supabase

endpoints.description: Trigger a sync of Shopee orders for the last N days

features.name: Dashboard Page with Metrics and Charts
features.description: Client-side dashboard showing profit KPIs (GMV, Revenue, Orders, profit margin), date-range filtering, platform filtering, sync trigger button, and bar/pie charts via Recharts

features.name: DateRangePicker Component
features.description: Dropdown UI for selecting date presets (Today, Yesterday, Last 7/30 Days) or a custom date range, emits a string value used by the dashboard for filtering

features.name: Supabase Client
features.description: Supabase client initialization using environment variables for URL and anon key

known_limitations.issue: Supabase anon key used in server-side API routes via NEXT_PUBLIC_ env vars
known_limitations.impact: Anon key is exposed client-side; service role key should be used for server routes

known_limitations.issue: COGS is hardcoded to 0 for all orders
known_limitations.impact: Net profit calculation is inaccurate until user sets COGS manually
